Query: SELECT t0.DAT_MOVIMENTO AS ECF_CONSUMIDOR_DAT_MOVIMENTO, t0.TURNO_ID AS ECF_CONSUMIDOR_TURNO_ID, t0.DAT_EMISSAO AS ECF_CONSUMIDOR_DAT_EMISSAO, t0.NUM_NF AS ECF_CONSUMIDOR_NUM_NF, t0.PESSOA_ID AS ECF_CONSUMIDOR_PESSOA_ID, t0.SERIE AS ECF_CONSUMIDOR_SERIE, t0.DESCRICAO_INTERMEDIADOR AS ECF_CONSUMIDOR_DESCRICAO_INTER, t0.VAL_IBS_MONO AS ECF_CONSUMIDOR_VAL_IBS_MONO, t1.NUM_CNPJ AS EMPRESA_NUM_CNPJ, t1.CIDADE_ID AS EMPRESA_CIDADE_ID FROM ECF_CONSUMIDOR t0 LEFT JOIN EMPRESA t1 ON t1.EMPRESA_ID = t0.EMPRESA_ID WHERE t0.DAT_MOVIMENTO BETWEEN @dataInicial AND @dataFinal AND t0.EMPRESA_ID = @empresa_id
